highlights.item: `grimetime seed`: `pull` (snapshots), `delete` (keyed, guarded), `check`/`summary` `--json`, richer globals + demo checks; `purgeDemoSeedFixtures` in `demo-seed.ts`. `collections describe` uses Payload `payload/shared` field guards.
Admin session for `push`, `check`, `pull`, `delete`, `collections` (same creds as seed).

next.item: 09-02: modular seed graph from `index.ts`; keep orchestrator behavior equivalent.
09-06 remainder: `--dry-run`, `--json`, non-interactive flags; implement `pull` / `delete` with explicit safety gates.
Deepen `check` (globals fields, demo beyond key accounts) and redundancy `report` per PLAN.
